prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `689c358e`.
codex_response:
Implemented the new ARC2 task package for `689c358e`. The rule is: each non-`6`/non-`7` six-cell cross-like shape projects to the outer border along its dominant axis; the border side nearer the shape gets that shape’s color, and the opposite side gets `0`. I used the `arc2_opus46_summary.json` hint because it matched the official examples; there was no matching Sonnet entry, and no correction note was needed. No new shared primitive was added.

Code is in [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_689c358e/__init__.py#L1), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_689c358e/verifier.py#L1), and [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_689c358e/generator.py#L1). The generator matches the task family by keeping the fixed `11x11` framed layout, the `7` interior, the four official colors `2/5/8/9`, and randomized placements/orientations of the same six-cell motifs while preserving unique projected rows/columns.

Verification passed with:
- `conda run --no-capture-output -n arc python -m arc2.shared.verify --task 689c358e`
- `conda run --no-capture-output -n arc python -m arc2.shared.build --task 689c358e --n-examples 1000`
- `./arc2_verify_generated_all.sh --task 689c358e`

Artifacts are at [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/689c358e/task.json), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/689c358e/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/689c358e/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/689c358e/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/689c358e/previews/preview_03.png). `task.json` contains 1000 verified generated examples.
